what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment: an image asset in the design-assets channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter delimited by triple dashes
File has no body content beyond frontmatter
standouts: Target URI uses an image:// scheme and contains a space plus parenthetical '(40)'
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing/encoding issues
No checksum, MIME type, dimensions, or alt text for the image
No indication of who added the attachment or which message it belongs to
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub pointing a design-assets channel entry to an icon image file.
questions: What does the '(40)' in the target path signify?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
Which channel message or thread does this attachment belong to?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an image attachment record; the content matches that purpose.
apparent_themes: Minimal metadata stubs for design resources
intention_signals: Catalog a specific icon image as an attachment under the design-assets channel so it can be located by its id and target URI.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme with a path containing a space and a numeric parenthetical suffix.
contribution: A concrete attachment record that links a channel to a specific image asset target and records when it was added.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file for an image asset in the design-assets channel, pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (40) and timestamped 2026-06-22T12:26:25.986563+00:00.
intention_for_embedding: To register an icon image as an attachment within the design-assets channel for later retrieval and reference.
